before_isolation.acceptance_criteria: Reading is within site-defined safe limits for the planned work/restoration state.
before_isolation.action: Record baseline temperature reading at TT1753-1HGA30CT002 before shutdown/isolation.
before_isolation.interpretation: Temperature provides thermal-energy context for work and restoration.
before_isolation.purpose: Track thermal condition before and after isolation.

before_isolation.acceptance_criteria: Record value, units, timestamp, and local/remote source before changing isolation state.
before_isolation.action: Record baseline pressure reading at PT1757-1HGA30CP003 before shutdown/isolation.
before_isolation.interpretation: Baseline pressure helps compare depressurization trend after shutdown and relief.
before_isolation.limitation: Baseline reading is context, not proof of isolation.
before_isolation.purpose: Establish initial pressure condition before isolation.

before_isolation.acceptance_criteria: Record value, units/percent if available, timestamp, and local/remote source before changing isolation state.
before_isolation.action: Record baseline level reading at LG1759-1HGA30CL002 before shutdown/isolation.
before_isolation.interpretation: Baseline level helps compare drain-down trend after shutdown and draining.
before_isolation.limitation: Baseline reading is context, not proof of isolation.
before_isolation.purpose: Establish initial liquid inventory condition before isolation.

before_isolation.acceptance_criteria: Record value, units/percent if available, timestamp, and local/remote source before changing isolation state.
before_isolation.action: Record baseline level reading at LT1758-1HGA30CL001 before shutdown/isolation.
before_isolation.interpretation: Baseline level helps compare drain-down trend after shutdown and draining.
before_isolation.limitation: Baseline reading is context, not proof of isolation.
before_isolation.purpose: Establish initial liquid inventory condition before isolation.

before_isolation.acceptance_criteria: Record value, units/percent if available, timestamp, and local/remote source before changing isolation state.
before_isolation.action: Record baseline level reading at LI-1758 before shutdown/isolation.
before_isolation.interpretation: Baseline level helps compare drain-down trend after shutdown and draining.
before_isolation.limitation: Baseline reading is context, not proof of isolation.
before_isolation.purpose: Establish initial liquid inventory condition before isolation.

before_isolation.acceptance_criteria: Record value, units, timestamp, and local/remote source before changing isolation state.
before_isolation.action: Record baseline pressure reading at PI1755-1HGA30CP001 before shutdown/isolation.

before_isolation.purpose: Establish initial pressure condition before isolation.

restoration_reenergization.acceptance_criteria: Reading is within site-defined safe limits for the planned work/restoration state.
restoration_reenergization.action: Before lock removal and after controlled re-energization, compare TT1753-1HGA30CT002 against expected safe operating range.
restoration_reenergization.interpretation: Temperature provides thermal-energy context for work and restoration.
restoration_reenergization.purpose: Track thermal condition before and after isolation.

restoration_reenergization.acceptance_criteria: Pressure remains within the site-defined safe operating band with no unexpected rise or alarm.
restoration_reenergization.action: Before lock removal and after controlled re-energization, compare PT1757-1HGA30CP003 against expected safe operating range.
restoration_reenergization.interpretation: Pressure should rise only as expected for the approved startup/restoration sequence.
restoration_reenergization.limitation: Operating limits are site-specific and are not derivable from the P&ID.
restoration_reenergization.purpose: Detect abnormal pressure during controlled re-energization.

restoration_reenergization.acceptance_criteria: Level remains within the site-defined safe operating band with no unexpected rise, drop, or alarm.
restoration_reenergization.action: Before lock removal and after controlled re-energization, compare LG1759-1HGA30CL002 against expected safe operating range.
restoration_reenergization.interpretation: Level should change only as expected for the approved restoration/startup sequence.
restoration_reenergization.limitation: Operating limits are site-specific and are not derivable from the P&ID.
restoration_reenergization.purpose: Detect abnormal filling, draining, or level response during restoration.

restoration_reenergization.acceptance_criteria: Level remains within the site-defined safe operating band with no unexpected rise, drop, or alarm.
restoration_reenergization.action: Before lock removal and after controlled re-energization, compare LT1758-1HGA30CL001 against expected safe operating range.
restoration_reenergization.interpretation: Level should change only as expected for the approved restoration/startup sequence.
restoration_reenergization.limitation: Operating limits are site-specific and are not derivable from the P&ID.
restoration_reenergization.purpose: Detect abnormal filling, draining, or level response during restoration.

restoration_reenergization.acceptance_criteria: Level remains within the site-defined safe operating band with no unexpected rise, drop, or alarm.
restoration_reenergization.action: Before lock removal and after controlled re-energization, compare LI-1758 against expected safe operating range.
restoration_reenergization.interpretation: Level should change only as expected for the approved restoration/startup sequence.
restoration_reenergization.limitation: Operating limits are site-specific and are not derivable from the P&ID.
restoration_reenergization.purpose: Detect abnormal filling, draining, or level response during restoration.

restoration_reenergization.acceptance_criteria: Pressure remains within the site-defined safe operating band with no unexpected rise or alarm.
restoration_reenergization.action: Before lock removal and after controlled re-energization, compare PI1755-1HGA30CP001 against expected safe operating range.
restoration_reenergization.interpretation: Pressure should rise only as expected for the approved startup/restoration sequence.
restoration_reenergization.limitation: Operating limits are site-specific and are not derivable from the P&ID.
restoration_reenergization.purpose: Detect abnormal pressure during controlled re-energization.

stored_energy_relief.acceptance_criteria: Temperature reaches the configured safe work limit and remains stable.
stored_energy_relief.action: Monitor temperature trend at TT1753-1HGA30CT002 during cooldown.
stored_energy_relief.interpretation: A temperature trend toward ambient or a site-defined safe temperature supports cooldown/warmup.
stored_energy_relief.limitation: Remote transmitter readings are supporting trends only unless site procedure accepts them. Temperature indication does not prove process isolation.
stored_energy_relief.purpose: Confirm thermal energy is reducing and detect unsafe heat/cold conditions.

stored_energy_relief.acceptance_criteria: Reading is at zero gauge pressure or the configured safe threshold, remains stable for the required hold period, and no reaccumulation is observed.
stored_energy_relief.action: Monitor pressure trend at PT1757-1HGA30CP003 while bleeding/venting.
stored_energy_relief.interpretation: A falling pressure trend supports depressurization; stable zero gauge pressure or a site-defined safe pressure limit supports a depressurized state.
stored_energy_relief.limitation: Remote transmitter readings are supporting trends only unless site procedure accepts them. Pressure indication supports depressurization but must be confirmed by an approved field verification method.
stored_energy_relief.purpose: Confirm pressure is being relieved and detect pressure reaccumulation.

stored_energy_relief.acceptance_criteria: Reading reaches the site-defined empty/low-safe level and remains stable with no unexpected refill.
stored_energy_relief.action: Monitor level trend at LG1759-1HGA30CL002 while draining/emptying.
stored_energy_relief.interpretation: A falling level trend supports drain-down; low/empty level supports reduced liquid inventory.
stored_energy_relief.limitation: Local indication is stronger field context, but still advisory in this tool. Level indication does not prove zero pressure or complete energy isolation.
stored_energy_relief.purpose: Confirm inventory is draining/emptying and detect unexpected refill.

stored_energy_relief.acceptance_criteria: Reading reaches the site-defined empty/low-safe level and remains stable with no unexpected refill.
stored_energy_relief.action: Monitor level trend at LT1758-1HGA30CL001 while draining/emptying.
stored_energy_relief.interpretation: A falling level trend supports drain-down; low/empty level supports reduced liquid inventory.
stored_energy_relief.limitation: Remote transmitter readings are supporting trends only unless site procedure accepts them. Level indication does not prove zero pressure or complete energy isolation.
stored_energy_relief.purpose: Confirm inventory is draining/emptying and detect unexpected refill.

stored_energy_relief.acceptance_criteria: Reading reaches the site-defined empty/low-safe level and remains stable with no unexpected refill.
stored_energy_relief.action: Monitor level trend at LI-1758 while draining/emptying.
stored_energy_relief.interpretation: A falling level trend supports drain-down; low/empty level supports reduced liquid inventory.
stored_energy_relief.limitation: Local indication is stronger field context, but still advisory in this tool. Level indication does not prove zero pressure or complete energy isolation.
stored_energy_relief.purpose: Confirm inventory is draining/emptying and detect unexpected refill.

stored_energy_relief.acceptance_criteria: Reading is at zero gauge pressure or the configured safe threshold, remains stable for the required hold period, and no reaccumulation is observed.
stored_energy_relief.action: Monitor pressure trend at PI1755-1HGA30CP001 while bleeding/venting.
stored_energy_relief.interpretation: A falling pressure trend supports depressurization; stable zero gauge pressure or a site-defined safe pressure limit supports a depressurized state.
stored_energy_relief.limitation: Local indication is stronger field context, but still advisory in this tool. Pressure indication supports depressurization but must be confirmed by an approved field verification method.
stored_energy_relief.purpose: Confirm pressure is being relieved and detect pressure reaccumulation.

verification_before_work.acceptance_criteria: Use as supporting context with approved field verification for zero energy and trapped pressure.
verification_before_work.action: Use LG1759-1HGA30CL002 as supporting indication only; field-verify zero energy by an approved method.
verification_before_work.interpretation: Low or empty level supports that liquid inventory has been removed from the measured section.
verification_before_work.limitation: A level reading cannot prove depressurization; trapped pressure may still exist.

verification_before_work.acceptance_criteria: Use as supporting context with approved field verification for zero energy and trapped pressure.
verification_before_work.action: Use LI-1758 as supporting indication only; field-verify zero energy by an approved method.
verification_before_work.interpretation: Low or empty level supports that liquid inventory has been removed from the measured section.
verification_before_work.limitation: A level reading cannot prove depressurization; trapped pressure may still exist.

verification_before_work.acceptance_criteria: Use only with an approved bleed/test point or site-approved field verification method.
verification_before_work.action: Use PI1755-1HGA30CP001 as supporting indication only; field-verify zero energy by an approved method.
verification_before_work.interpretation: Zero gauge pressure or pressure below the site-defined safe limit supports, but does not alone prove, zero pressure energy.
verification_before_work.limitation: Local indication is stronger field context, but still advisory in this tool. Pressure indication alone does not prove isolation.
verification_before_work.purpose: Support zero-energy verification for pressure energy.

instruments.verification_note: Remote pressure transmission is supporting context only unless site procedure accepts it.

instruments.name: level gauge
instruments.relevance_basis: reachable from selected equipment or selected isolation section through HILT topology
instruments.verification_note: Level indication supports inventory/drain-down checks but does not prove zero pressure.

instruments.name: level transmitter

instruments.verification_note: Remote level transmission is supporting context only unless site procedure accepts it.

instruments.name: level indicator

instruments.verification_note: Level indication supports inventory/drain-down checks but does not prove zero pressure.

instruments.name: pressure indicator
instruments.relevance_basis: recognized STLM instrument visually adjacent to selected equipment
instruments.verification_note: Local pressure indication supports zero-pressure verification but does not prove isolation by itself.

restoration_reenergization.action: Before lock removal and after controlled re-energization, compare PI1755-1HGA30CP001 against expected safe operating range.
restoration_reenergization.interpretation: Pressure should rise only as expected for the approved startup/restoration sequence.
restoration_reenergization.limitation: Operating limits are site-specific and are not derivable from the P&ID.
restoration_reenergization.purpose: Detect abnormal pressure during controlled re-energization.

stored_energy_relief.acceptance_criteria: Temperature reaches the configured safe work limit and remains stable.
stored_energy_relief.action: Monitor temperature trend at TT1753-1HGA30CT002 during cooldown.
stored_energy_relief.interpretation: A temperature trend toward ambient or a site-defined safe temperature supports cooldown/warmup.
stored_energy_relief.limitation: Remote transmitter readings are supporting trends only unless site procedure accepts them. Temperature indication does not prove process isolation.
stored_energy_relief.purpose: Confirm thermal energy is reducing and detect unsafe heat/cold conditions.

stored_energy_relief.acceptance_criteria: Reading is at zero gauge pressure or the configured safe threshold, remains stable for the required hold period, and no reaccumulation is observed.
stored_energy_relief.action: Monitor pressure trend at PT1757-1HGA30CP003 while bleeding/venting.
stored_energy_relief.interpretation: A falling pressure trend supports depressurization; stable zero gauge pressure or a site-defined safe pressure limit supports a depressurized state.
stored_energy_relief.limitation: Remote transmitter readings are supporting trends only unless site procedure accepts them. Pressure indication supports depressurization but must be confirmed by an approved field verification method.
stored_energy_relief.purpose: Confirm pressure is being relieved and detect pressure reaccumulation.

stored_energy_relief.acceptance_criteria: Reading reaches the site-defined empty/low-safe level and remains stable with no unexpected refill.
stored_energy_relief.action: Monitor level trend at LG1759-1HGA30CL002 while draining/emptying.
stored_energy_relief.interpretation: A falling level trend supports drain-down; low/empty level supports reduced liquid inventory.
stored_energy_relief.limitation: Local indication is stronger field context, but still advisory in this tool. Level indication does not prove zero pressure or complete energy isolation.
stored_energy_relief.purpose: Confirm inventory is draining/emptying and detect unexpected refill.

stored_energy_relief.acceptance_criteria: Reading reaches the site-defined empty/low-safe level and remains stable with no unexpected refill.
stored_energy_relief.action: Monitor level trend at LT1758-1HGA30CL001 while draining/emptying.
stored_energy_relief.interpretation: A falling level trend supports drain-down; low/empty level supports reduced liquid inventory.
stored_energy_relief.limitation: Remote transmitter readings are supporting trends only unless site procedure accepts them. Level indication does not prove zero pressure or complete energy isolation.
stored_energy_relief.purpose: Confirm inventory is draining/emptying and detect unexpected refill.

stored_energy_relief.acceptance_criteria: Reading reaches the site-defined empty/low-safe level and remains stable with no unexpected refill.
stored_energy_relief.action: Monitor level trend at LI-1758 while draining/emptying.
stored_energy_relief.interpretation: A falling level trend supports drain-down; low/empty level supports reduced liquid inventory.
stored_energy_relief.limitation: Local indication is stronger field context, but still advisory in this tool. Level indication does not prove zero pressure or complete energy isolation.
stored_energy_relief.purpose: Confirm inventory is draining/emptying and detect unexpected refill.

stored_energy_relief.acceptance_criteria: Reading is at zero gauge pressure or the configured safe threshold, remains stable for the required hold period, and no reaccumulation is observed.
stored_energy_relief.action: Monitor pressure trend at PI1755-1HGA30CP001 while bleeding/venting.
stored_energy_relief.interpretation: A falling pressure trend supports depressurization; stable zero gauge pressure or a site-defined safe pressure limit supports a depressurized state.
stored_energy_relief.limitation: Local indication is stronger field context, but still advisory in this tool. Pressure indication supports depressurization but must be confirmed by an approved field verification method.
stored_energy_relief.purpose: Confirm pressure is being relieved and detect pressure reaccumulation.

verification_before_work.acceptance_criteria: Use as supporting context with approved field verification for zero energy and trapped pressure.
verification_before_work.action: Use LG1759-1HGA30CL002 as supporting indication only; field-verify zero energy by an approved method.
verification_before_work.interpretation: Low or empty level supports that liquid inventory has been removed from the measured section.
verification_before_work.limitation: A level reading cannot prove depressurization; trapped pressure may still exist.

verification_before_work.acceptance_criteria: Use as supporting context with approved field verification for zero energy and trapped pressure.
verification_before_work.action: Use LI-1758 as supporting indication only; field-verify zero energy by an approved method.
verification_before_work.interpretation: Low or empty level supports that liquid inventory has been removed from the measured section.
verification_before_work.limitation: A level reading cannot prove depressurization; trapped pressure may still exist.

verification_before_work.acceptance_criteria: Use only with an approved bleed/test point or site-approved field verification method.
verification_before_work.action: Use PI1755-1HGA30CP001 as supporting indication only; field-verify zero energy by an approved method.
verification_before_work.interpretation: Zero gauge pressure or pressure below the site-defined safe limit supports, but does not alone prove, zero pressure energy.
verification_before_work.limitation: Local indication is stronger field context, but still advisory in this tool. Pressure indication alone does not prove isolation.
verification_before_work.purpose: Support zero-energy verification for pressure energy.

instruments.verification_note: Remote temperature transmission is supporting context only.

instruments.name: level indicator

instruments.verification_note: Level indication supports inventory/drain-down checks but does not prove zero pressure.

instruments.name: pressure indicator
instruments.relevance_basis: recognized STLM instrument visually adjacent to selected equipment
instruments.verification_note: Local pressure indication supports zero-pressure verification but does not prove isolation by itself.

phases.objective: Identify type and magnitude of energy, hazards, and control method.
phases.title: Preparation for shutdown

field_action_required: Follow the plant's established shutdown procedure for this equipment (not derivable from the P&ID graph). An orderly shutdown avoids additional hazard.
phases.objective: Orderly shutdown using the established process procedure.
phases.title: Equipment shutdown

detected_schemes.basis: detected from HILT process-line topology; no hazard-based scheme recommendation was made
detected from HILT process-line topology; no hazard-based scheme recommendation was made

phases.objective: Operate each energy-isolating device to isolate the equipment from every energy source.
phases.title: Equipment isolation
phases.within_phase_ordering_note: OSHA 1910.147 does NOT prescribe the order in which multiple isolating devices are operated within this phase -- only that all are operated. The within-phase order shown is either the agent's committed judgment or a flow-grounded default (isolate INLET / upstream devices first) derived from the HILT-parsed flow direction (source_flow_role). Each device's source_flow_role (inlet/outlet) is provided -- use it to justify the order.

field_action_required: Each authorized employee applies their assigned individual lock to every isolating device.
phases.objective: Affix an individual lock (and tag) to EACH energy-isolating device, holding it in safe/off.
phases.title: Lockout/tagout device application

field_action_required: NO bleed/vent/drain point was found on the P&ID. Treat trapped process energy as present; field-verify a means to bleed/vent before beginning work, and continue monitoring if reaccumulation is possible (1910.147(d)(5)(ii)).

phases.objective: Verify isolation and de-energization (e.g. pressure gauge reads zero / test point confirms no flow).
phases.title: Verification of isolation

loto_procedure.release_note: On completion: inspect area, ensure personnel clear, verify controls neutral, remove locks (reverse order), re-energize, notify affected employees. Before lock removal and after controlled re-energization, review supporting instrument indications/alarms (TT1753-1HGA30CT002, PT1757-1HGA30CP003, LG1759-1HGA30CL002, LT1758-1HGA30CL001, LI-1758, PI1755-1HGA30CP001) for expected safe conditions.

restoration_checks.acceptance_criteria: Reading is within site-defined safe limits for the planned work/restoration state.
restoration_checks.action: Before lock removal and after controlled re-energization, compare TT1753-1HGA30CT002 against expected safe operating range.
restoration_checks.interpretation: Temperature provides thermal-energy context for work and restoration.
restoration_checks.purpose: Track thermal condition before and after isolation.

restoration_checks.acceptance_criteria: Pressure remains within the site-defined safe operating band with no unexpected rise or alarm.
restoration_checks.action: Before lock removal and after controlled re-energization, compare PT1757-1HGA30CP003 against expected safe operating range.
restoration_checks.interpretation: Pressure should rise only as expected for the approved startup/restoration sequence.
restoration_checks.limitation: Operating limits are site-specific and are not derivable from the P&ID.
restoration_checks.purpose: Detect abnormal pressure during controlled re-energization.

restoration_checks.acceptance_criteria: Level remains within the site-defined safe operating band with no unexpected rise, drop, or alarm.
restoration_checks.action: Before lock removal and after controlled re-energization, compare LG1759-1HGA30CL002 against expected safe operating range.
restoration_checks.interpretation: Level should change only as expected for the approved restoration/startup sequence.
restoration_checks.limitation: Operating limits are site-specific and are not derivable from the P&ID.
restoration_checks.purpose: Detect abnormal filling, draining, or level response during restoration.

restoration_checks.acceptance_criteria: Level remains within the site-defined safe operating band with no unexpected rise, drop, or alarm.
